---
name: billing-lifecycle
description: Plan or review billing cycles, invoices, credit flows, reconciliation, and audit-sensitive state transitions.
---

# Billing Lifecycle Skill

Use this skill when the task involves subscriptions, invoicing, credits, settlements, usage windows, or provider reconciliation.

## What to do

1. Identify the billable entity and billing boundary.
2. Define statuses, transitions, and money-moving events explicitly.
3. Distinguish internal billing state from external provider state.
4. Call out idempotency, retries, reconciliation, and audit requirements.
5. Use the template to align domain, application, and infrastructure responsibilities.

## Included resources

- [billing-cycle-template.md](./templates/billing-cycle-template.md)
